# Brand Strategy Productization Blueprint

## Part 1 — Atomic Decomposition

**Deliverables**
- Brand audit (current-state diagnostic)
- Competitive landscape map
- Customer/stakeholder insights synthesis
- Positioning statement
- Messaging architecture (value prop, pillars, proof points)
- Voice & tone guide
- Naming recommendation (primary or secondary names)
- Tagline development
- Brand narrative / origin story
- Brand guide PDF (compiled deliverable)
- Internal rollout playbook
- Agency/designer handoff brief

**Time blocks**
- 60-min kickoff call
- 45-min stakeholder interview (per interview)
- 60-min customer interview (per interview)
- 90-min positioning workshop
- 60-min messaging workshop
- 45-min mid-engagement review
- 60-min final presentation
- 30-min async Loom walkthrough (in lieu of live)

**Access tiers**
- Email-only, 48-hr response
- Slack Connect, 24-hr response
- Direct text/WhatsApp, same-day response
- Scheduled office hours (weekly 30-min)

**Support levels**
- 1 round of revisions on each deliverable
- 2 rounds of revisions
- Unlimited revisions within engagement window
- 30-day post-delivery async support
- 90-day embedded advisor retainer

**Customizations**
- Number of stakeholder interviews (3 / 6 / 10)
- Number of customer interviews (0 / 3 / 6)
- B2B vs. B2C vs. B2B2C orientation
- Industry depth (generalist vs. category-specialist research)
- Internal-only vs. agency-handoff-ready outputs
- Naming included vs. excluded
- Single brand vs. multi-brand/portfolio

## Part 2 — Configuration Architecture

| Dimension | What it controls | Levels | Dependencies |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Depth** | Research thoroughness — interviews, audit rigor | Light (3 stakeholder, 0 customer) / Standard (6 stakeholder, 3 customer) / Deep (10 stakeholder, 6 customer) | Deep blocks Sprint pace |
| **Breadth** | Brand-system scope | Verbal-only (positioning + messaging) / +Voice (adds voice & tone, narrative) / Full system (adds naming, tagline, handoff brief) | Naming requires Full system; handoff brief requires +Voice minimum |
| **Pace** | Calendar duration | Sprint (2 weeks) / Standard (6 weeks) / Extended (10 weeks) | Sprint blocks Deep depth; Sprint blocks Full system breadth |
| **Format** | Delivery mode | Async-only (Loom + docs) / Hybrid (mix) / Live (workshops + presentations) | Async-only blocks Deep depth; Live required for Full system |
| **Support** | Revisions + access | 1 round + email / 2 rounds + Slack / Unlimited + Slack + office hours | — |
| **Audience Orientation** *(domain-specific)* | Which research lens drives the work | B2B / B2C / B2B2C / Portfolio (multi-brand) | Portfolio requires Standard pace minimum and +Voice breadth minimum |
| **Handoff Readiness** *(domain-specific)* | Whether outputs are usable by external partners | Internal-only / Designer-ready / Agency-ready | Agency-ready requires Full system breadth |
| **Add-ons** | Discrete extras | Naming sprint / 30-day async support / 90-day advisor retainer / Extra customer interviews ($ each) | 90-day retainer requires Standard tier or above |

**Invalid combinations the configurator must block:**
- Sprint pace + Deep depth
- Sprint pace + Full system breadth
- Async-only format + Deep depth
- Async-only format + Full system breadth
- Naming add-on without Full system breadth
- Portfolio orientation + Sprint pace
- Agency-ready handoff without Full system breadth
- 90-day retainer add-on at Lite tier

## Part 3 — Three Tiers + Build-Your-Own

| Tier | Price | Configuration | Positioning | Pricing Anchor |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Lite — Positioning Sprint** | **$6,500** | Depth: Light · Breadth: Verbal-only · Pace: Sprint (2w) · Format: Hybrid · Support: 1 round + email · Orientation: B2B or B2C | For early-stage founders who need defensible positioning and core messaging fast — before a website, pitch deck, or fundraise | ~43% of flagship; entry tier priced against the cost of bad positioning (one wasted website rebuild, one botched raise). Below the threshold where founders shop agencies. |
| **Core — Brand Guide** *(flagship)* | **$15,000** | Depth: Standard · Breadth: +Voice · Pace: Standard (6w) · Format: Live · Support: 2 rounds + Slack · Orientation: any single | Senior-strategist-led brand foundation for funded startups and growing companies who need a complete verbal brand without committing to a full agency engagement | Half of typical mid-tier agency engagements ($25–50K) for comparable depth, delivered solo. Sum-of-parts BYO equivalent prices ~$18.5K — flagship is the rational discount. |
| **Premium — Full Brand System + Embed** | **$32,000** | Depth: Deep · Breadth: Full system · Pace: Extended (10w) · Format: Live · Support: Unlimited + office hours · Orientation: any · Handoff: Agency-ready · Includes: 30-day async support | For Series A+ companies, rebrands, and portfolio plays where naming, narrative, and a clean designer/agency handoff matter — replaces a $45–60K consultancy engagement | Below the $45–60K range of established brand consultancies; sum-of-parts BYO equivalent prices ~$38K — flagship preserves discount. |

### Build-Your-Own Framework

**Base price:** $6,500 (Lite configuration)

**Per-dimension upgrade pricing:**
- Depth: Light → Standard +$3,500 · Standard → Deep +$5,000
- Breadth: Verbal-only → +Voice +$3,000 · +Voice → Full system +$5,500 (includes naming)
- Pace: Sprint → Standard +$1,500 · Standard → Extended +$2,500
- Format: Async-only −$1,500 · Hybrid baseline · Live +$2,000
- Support: 1 round → 2 rounds +$1,500 · 2 rounds → Unlimited +$3,500
- Audience Orientation: Portfolio +$4,000
- Handoff: Designer-ready +$1,500 · Agency-ready +$3,500

**Add-ons (flat):**
- Naming sprint (standalone): +$5,000
- Extra customer interviews: +$750 each
- 30-day async post-delivery support: +$2,500
- 90-day advisor retainer: +$8,000

**Floor:** $6,500 — anything below routes to a paid 90-min "Positioning Diagnostic" ($1,500) instead of a project.

**Ceiling:** $28,000 — anything above this auto-routes to Premium flagship (cheaper for the buyer, easier to scope for you).

**Configurator must enforce:**
- All invalid combinations from Part 2
- BYO can never reach Premium config for less than $32,000 (currently sums to ~$38K — protected)
- BYO can never reach Core config for less than $15,000 (currently sums to ~$18.5K — protected)
- Naming sprint locked unless Full system breadth selected (or sold standalone above $6,500 floor)
- 90-day retainer add-on hidden until Core tier or BYO equivalent reached

**Flagship-protection rule:** Both Core and Premium configurations, if assembled atom-by-atom in BYO, price ~20–25% above the flagship price. Flagships always remain the rational discount.

---

Want me to take this further? I can:
- **Identify highest-leverage atoms** — which 1–2 modules, if standardized into reusable templates, would unlock the most BYO throughput for you
- **Emit Parts 2 and 3 as JSON/YAML** for a Typeform or Webflow configurator
- **Stress-test edge cases** — e.g., "rebrand for a 50-person B2B SaaS" or "pre-launch DTC founder with $5K"

# Productization Blueprint: 1-on-1 Fitness Coaching → Configurable Offering

---

## Part 1 — Atomic Decomposition

**Deliverables**
- Movement / mobility assessment report
- Custom training program (PDF or app-delivered)
- Custom nutrition / macro plan
- Habit tracker / weekly scorecard
- Progress check-in report (monthly)
- Form-check video review (per submission)
- Recovery / sleep protocol
- Supplement recommendations doc

**Time blocks**
- 60-min intake / goals call
- 45-min movement assessment (in-person or video)
- 30-min weekly check-in call
- 60-min monthly strategy / re-program call
- 15-min "SOS" call (urgent question, plateau, travel)

**Access tiers**
- Email-only (48hr response)
- Async messaging in-app (24hr response, business days)
- Async messaging (12hr response, 7 days/week)
- Direct text/WhatsApp (same-day)

**Support levels**
- Program updates: monthly / bi-weekly / weekly / on-demand
- Form-check reviews: 0 / 2 per month / unlimited
- Nutrition adjustments: quarterly / monthly / weekly
- Office hours: none / group Q&A / 1-on-1

**Customizations**
- Goal type (fat loss, hypertrophy, strength, endurance, sport-specific, general health)
- Training environment (home / commercial gym / hybrid / specialty equipment)
- Frequency (2/3/4/5/6 days per week)
- Experience level (beginner / intermediate / advanced)
- Constraints (injuries, time-per-session cap, travel %)
- Nutrition depth (none / guidelines / macros / full meal plan)

---

## Part 2 — Configuration Architecture

| Dimension | What it controls | Levels | Dependencies |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Depth** | Assessment + program-design rigor | Template-based / Customized / Fully bespoke + assessed | Bespoke requires live or video movement assessment |
| **Breadth** | Domains coached | Training only / +Nutrition / +Recovery & lifestyle | Recovery requires Nutrition included |
| **Pace** | Re-programming cadence | Monthly / Bi-weekly / Weekly | Weekly re-prog requires ≥24hr access tier |
| **Format** | Delivery channel | App-only / App + async / App + async + live calls | Live calls only at Customized depth or higher |
| **Support** | Access + form-check + check-ins | Async-only / +Monthly call / +Weekly call & unlimited form-check | Weekly call requires Bi-weekly or Weekly Pace |
| **Accountability** *(domain-specific)* | How tightly behavior is monitored | Self-report / Weekly scorecard reviewed / Daily check-ins + nudges | Daily requires same-day access tier |
| **Goal Specificity** *(domain-specific)* | Program tailoring to outcome | General / Goal-tuned / Event-/competition-prepped | Event-prep requires Weekly pace + Weekly support |
| **Add-ons** | À la carte | Form-check pack (5) · In-person session · Travel program · Supplement protocol | Form-check pack requires App + async minimum |

**Invalid combinations the configurator must block:**
- Template depth + Weekly pace (no point re-templating weekly)
- App-only format + Weekly support (channel mismatch)
- Daily accountability + Async-only support (no channel for nudges)
- Event-prep goal + Monthly pace (insufficient iteration)
- Recovery breadth without Nutrition (recovery interventions assume nutrition baseline)
- Live calls at Template depth (calls imply customization)

---

## Part 3 — Three Tiers + Build-Your-Own

| Tier | Price | Configuration | Positioning | Anchor |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Foundation** (Lite) | **$197/mo** | Customized depth · Training only · Monthly pace · App + async · Async-only support · Self-report · General goal | For the self-motivated lifter who wants a real program (not a template) but doesn't need hand-holding. | Sits above template apps ($30–80/mo) and below entry coaching ($300+); captures price-sensitive serious trainees. |
| **Signature** (Core) — *flagship* | **$497/mo** | Customized depth · +Nutrition · Bi-weekly pace · App + async + live calls · Monthly call + form-checks · Weekly scorecard · Goal-tuned | For the busy professional with a specific goal who needs a coach, not just a program. | Industry standard online coaching is $300–600/mo; this is priced at the value top of that band with structurally more than peers (live calls + nutrition both included). |
| **Elite** (Premium) | **$1,200/mo** | Bespoke + assessed depth · +Recovery & lifestyle · Weekly pace · Full format · Weekly call + unlimited form-check · Daily accountability · Event/goal-prepped | For the competitor, executive, or post-injury returner where outcomes are non-negotiable. | Below true 1-on-1 in-person coaching ($1,500–2,500/mo) and competition-prep coaching ($1,500+); cheaper than sum-of-parts BYO equivalent (~$1,400). |

### Build-Your-Own Framework

**Base:** $197/mo (Foundation config)

**Per-dimension upgrade pricing (monthly add):**
- Depth: Customized → Bespoke + assessed: **+$250**
- Breadth: +Nutrition **+$120** · +Recovery **+$80**
- Pace: Monthly → Bi-weekly **+$80** · Bi-weekly → Weekly **+$120**
- Format: +Live calls **+$100**
- Support: +Monthly call **+$80** · +Weekly call & unlimited form-check **+$200**
- Accountability: +Weekly scorecard **+$60** · +Daily check-ins **+$150**
- Goal specificity: Goal-tuned **+$60** · Event-prepped **+$200**

**Add-ons (one-time or recurring):**
- Form-check pack (5): $120
- In-person session: $200/session
- Travel program (one-off): $150
- Supplement protocol: $90

**Floor:** $197/mo (Foundation as-is — no further stripping)
**Ceiling:** $950/mo BYO — at this point auto-route to Elite ($1,200) which becomes cheaper than continuing to stack.

**Flagship-protection check:**
- BYO to reach Signature config = $197 + $120 (nutrition) + $80 (bi-weekly) + $100 (calls) + $80 (monthly call) + $60 (scorecard) + $60 (goal-tuned) = **$697** vs. Signature at **$497** ✓
- BYO to reach Elite config = $197 + $250 + $120 + $80 + $120 (weekly pace) + $100 + $200 + $150 + $200 = **$1,417** vs. Elite at **$1,200** ✓

**Configurator dependencies to enforce:** all eight invalid combinations from Part 2; plus auto-suggest tier when BYO total within $50 of a tier's price.

---

Want me to follow up with any of these?
- **Highest-leverage atom** — which 1–2 atoms, if standardized first, unlock the most BYO velocity (likely the assessment + program-template library)
- **Configurator JSON output** — Parts 2 & 3 re-emitted as machine-readable spec for Typeform/Webflow
- **Edge-case stress-test** — pick a tricky client profile (e.g., "traveling exec, post-shoulder-surgery, wants to deadlift 500") and watch the dimensions resolve

## Part 1 — Atomic Decomposition

**Deliverables**
- Change-readiness assessment report
- Stakeholder map + influence/resistance matrix
- Communications plan (cadence, channels, message architecture)
- Training curriculum outline
- Manager enablement toolkit (talking points, FAQ, objection responses)
- Adoption metrics dashboard spec
- Executive steering deck (recurring)
- Post-mortem / lessons-learned report
- Risk register + mitigation playbook

**Time blocks**
- 90-min executive sponsor alignment session
- 60-min stakeholder interview (per stakeholder)
- 2-hr leadership team workshop
- 4-hr change-impact analysis working session
- 90-min weekly steering committee
- 60-min manager coaching session (1:1)
- Half-day all-hands launch facilitation

**Access tiers**
- Async Slack/Teams channel (response within 1 business day)
- Weekly office hours (group, 60 min)
- Direct line to consultant (same-day)
- Embedded on-site days (per day)

**Support levels**
- One round of revisions per deliverable
- Unlimited revisions for the engagement window
- Async document review (48-hr turnaround)
- Live co-editing sessions

**Customizations**
- Org size in scope (single function / division / enterprise-wide)
- Change type (system implementation, M&A integration, restructure, culture, process)
- Workforce composition (HQ-only, distributed, frontline + knowledge mix)
- Industry regulatory load (light / regulated / heavily regulated)
- Engagement length (8 / 16 / 26 weeks)
- Internal change team maturity (none, nascent, established)

## Part 2 — Configuration Architecture

| Dimension | What it controls | Levels | Dependencies |
|---|---|---|---|
| Depth | Diagnostic + intervention rigor | Surface / Standard / Deep | Deep requires ≥16-week pace; blocks Sprint |
| Breadth | Org scope covered | Single function / Division / Enterprise | Enterprise requires Standard or Deep depth; Enterprise blocks Sprint pace |
| Pace | Engagement calendar | Sprint (8w) / Standard (16w) / Extended (26w) | Sprint blocks Deep + Enterprise |
| Format | Consultant presence model | Async-led / Hybrid / Embedded | Embedded requires Standard or Extended pace |
| Support | Revision + access model | Bounded (1 round, office hours) / Standard (unlimited revisions, async DM) / White-glove (same-day, on-site days) | White-glove requires Hybrid or Embedded format |
| Change-Type Complexity *(domain-specific)* | Nature of change drives toolkit + risk model | Process / System / Structural / Cultural-or-M&A | Cultural/M&A requires Standard depth minimum |
| Workforce Reach *(domain-specific)* | Audience the change must land with | Knowledge workers only / Mixed / Frontline-heavy | Frontline-heavy requires Hybrid or Embedded format (async-only blocked) |
| Internal-Team Handoff *(domain-specific)* | Capability transfer to client team | None / Light enablement / Full train-the-trainer | Train-the-trainer requires Standard depth and ≥16w pace |
| Add-ons | Discrete scope expansions | Manager coaching cohort · Executive comms ghostwriting · Adoption dashboard build · Post-launch 90-day check-in | Dashboard build requires Standard depth |

**Invalid combinations the configurator must block:**
- Sprint pace + Deep depth
- Sprint pace + Enterprise breadth
- Async-led format + Frontline-heavy workforce
- Async-led format + White-glove support
- Bounded support + Embedded format
- Train-the-trainer handoff + Sprint pace
- Cultural/M&A change type + Surface depth
- Dashboard add-on + Surface depth

## Part 3 — Three Tiers + Build-Your-Own

| Tier | Configuration | Positioning Line | Pricing | Anchor |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Lite — Change Readiness Sprint** | Surface depth · Single-function breadth · Sprint pace · Async-led · Bounded support · Process or System change · Knowledge workers · No handoff | For mid-market leaders launching a defined process or system change in one function who need a credible plan in 8 weeks, not a Big-4 deck. | **$45,000** | ~35% of flagship; priced against the cost of a botched rollout (typically $250K+ in lost productivity); below the floor of Big-4/regional firms ($75K+ minimum). |
| **Core — Managed Change Engagement** *(flagship)* | Standard depth · Division breadth · Standard pace (16w) · Hybrid format · Standard support · Any change type · Mixed workforce · Light enablement · Includes manager coaching cohort | For mid-market companies running a division-wide transformation who want a senior operator embedded — not a deck-and-leave consultancy. | **$135,000** | Sits at half the cost of Big-4 equivalents ($250–400K) for comparable scope; sum-of-parts via BYO would price at ~$160K — flagship is the rational buy. |
| **Premium — Enterprise Transformation Partner** | Deep depth · Enterprise breadth · Extended pace (26w) · Embedded format · White-glove support · Any change type incl. Cultural/M&A · Any workforce · Full train-the-trainer · Includes dashboard build + post-launch check-in | For mid-market firms in M&A integration, restructure, or culture change where failure is existential and the internal team needs to own it after you leave. | **$340,000** | Below the $500K–$750K range of boutique transformation firms; capability-transfer component priced as embedded interim Chief Transformation Officer (~$30K/mo equivalent). |

### Build-Your-Own Framework

**Base:** $45,000 (Lite configuration)

**Per-dimension upgrade pricing:**
- Depth: Surface → Standard **+$25K** · Standard → Deep **+$45K**
- Breadth: Single-function → Division **+$20K** · Division → Enterprise **+$50K**
- Pace: Sprint → Standard **+$15K** · Standard → Extended **+$30K**
- Format: Async-led → Hybrid **+$20K** · Hybrid → Embedded **+$45K** *(or $4K/embedded day)*
- Support: Bounded → Standard **+$12K** · Standard → White-glove **+$28K**
- Change-Type Complexity: Cultural/M&A surcharge **+$20K**
- Workforce Reach: Frontline-heavy surcharge **+$15K**
- Internal-Team Handoff: Light **+$10K** · Train-the-trainer **+$30K**
- Add-ons: Manager coaching cohort **+$18K** · Exec comms ghostwriting **+$12K** · Adoption dashboard build **+$22K** · 90-day post-launch check-in **+$15K**

**Floor:** $45,000 (Lite as configured; nothing ships below this)

**Ceiling:** $250,000 — any BYO config exceeding this auto-routes to Premium or custom-scoped conversation

**Configurator must enforce:**
- All invalid combinations from Part 2
- Embedded format requires minimum Standard support
- Enterprise breadth requires minimum Standard depth + Standard pace
- Train-the-trainer requires Standard depth + ≥16-week pace
- Dashboard add-on requires Standard depth minimum

**Flagship-protection rule:** A BYO config matching Core's spec sums to ~$160K (base $45K + Standard depth $25K + Division breadth $20K + Standard pace $15K + Hybrid $20K + Standard support $12K + Light handoff $10K + manager coaching $18K) vs. Core's $135K flagship — **$25K savings preserved.** A BYO match of Premium sums to ~$385K vs. $340K flagship — **$45K savings preserved.** Re-validate any pricing change against this rule.

Want me to: (a) re-emit Parts 2 and 3 as JSON for a configurator build, (b) identify the 1–2 highest-leverage atoms to standardize first, or (c) stress-test this against a concrete scenario (e.g., "200-person manufacturer, ERP rollout, frontline-heavy")?

This skill doesn't apply here, and forcing it would give you worse output than doing nothing.

**Why:** Intelligent Clay productizes *services* — turning human-delivered work (consulting, agency, coaching, done-for-you) into configurable packages. Your offering is already a software product with three tiers. SaaS is modular by construction: features, seats, usage limits, and add-ons are your atoms, and they're already structured.

Running this skill on your business would produce a decomposition that just restates what your pricing page already says.

**What you likely actually want, depending on the real question underneath:**

- **Packaging & tier design for SaaS** — moving features between Free/Pro/Enterprise, designing a fourth tier, value-metric selection (per-seat vs. per-project vs. usage). This is a SaaS pricing exercise (Kyle Poyar, OpenView, Patrick Campbell territory), not a productization exercise.
- **Add-on / module strategy** — unbundling features (advanced reporting, integrations, SSO, audit logs) into paid add-ons across tiers. This is feature-tiering work.
- **Self-serve to Enterprise expansion paths** — designing the upgrade ladder and what triggers each step.
- **PLG motion / activation** — converting freemium to Pro. This is growth/PM territory.
- **A services layer on top of your SaaS** — onboarding, implementation, training, managed services. *This* would be in scope for Intelligent Clay — productizing the human-delivered services that wrap your software.

**If you want to proceed with this skill,** tell me about the services side: do you offer implementation, onboarding, customer success, training, or custom integrations as paid engagements? Those are clay. The software isn't.

Otherwise, you're better served by a SaaS pricing/packaging skill or framework.

This skill doesn't apply here. Handmade leather wallets are a **physical product**, not a service — there's no process to atomize, no time blocks to package, no access tiers to sell.

What you likely want instead is **SKU/bundle architecture**, which is a different problem:

- **Variants** — leather type, color, stitching, hardware, monogramming
- **Tiers via materials/finish** — standard / premium leather / exotic
- **Bundles** — wallet + cardholder + keychain sets
- **Customization upcharges** — initials, custom interior layout, gift packaging

If any of these are true, I can help under a different frame:

1. **You also offer a service** around the wallets — custom design consultations, bespoke commissions, repair/restoration, corporate gifting programs. *That* is productizable, and I can run the full blueprint on it.

2. **You want to turn wallet-making into a teachable service** — workshops, courses, 1-on-1 leathercraft coaching. Also productizable.

3. **You want SKU/variant/bundle strategy for the physical product itself** — that's a merchandising/e-commerce problem, not this skill. You'd want a pricing-and-assortment framework instead.

Which of those is closer to what you're after?

# Productization Blueprint — Enterprise Onboarding Package

**Hybrid offering note:** The $99/mo SaaS is a fixed atom (not decomposed). The $2,500 implementation service is the clay. Below modularizes the service portion only.

---

## Part 1 — Atomic Decomposition

**Deliverables**
- Configured production tenant (workspace, roles, permissions)
- Migrated data set (validated + reconciled)
- Integration connections (SSO, CRM, billing, etc.)
- Custom field / workflow configuration
- Admin runbook (PDF)
- Recorded training videos (tenant-specific)
- 30/60/90-day success plan
- UAT sign-off document

**Time blocks**
- 45-min discovery & scoping call
- 60-min kickoff workshop
- 90-min admin training session
- 60-min end-user training session (per cohort)
- 30-min go-live readiness review
- 30-min post-launch check-in (week 2, week 4)

**Access tiers**
- Email support (24-hr response)
- Shared Slack/Teams channel (4-hr response, business hours)
- Dedicated implementation manager (named contact)
- Direct line to solutions engineer (for technical migration questions)

**Support levels**
- Self-serve docs only
- Async review of customer-prepared CSVs
- Done-for-you data migration (we run the import)
- White-glove migration (we extract from source system + transform + load)
- Post-launch revision window (15 / 30 / 60 days)

**Customizations**
- Record volume (<10K / 10K–100K / 100K+)
- # of integrations (0 / 1–2 / 3+)
- # of user cohorts trained (1 / 2–3 / 4+)
- Custom workflow build (none / templated / bespoke)
- Timeline compression (sprint / standard / phased rollout)

---

## Part 2 — Configuration Architecture

| Dimension | What it controls | Levels | Dependencies |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Migration Depth** | Who does the data work | Self-serve / Async-reviewed / Done-for-you / White-glove | White-glove requires 2+ week timeline; blocks Sprint pace |
| **Integration Scope** | # & complexity of connected systems | None / SSO-only / +1 business system / Full stack (3+) | Full stack requires Done-for-you or White-glove migration |
| **Training Breadth** | Who gets trained, how | Admin-only async / Admin live / Admin + 1 cohort / Admin + multi-cohort | Multi-cohort requires Standard or Phased pace |
| **Pace** | Timeline | Sprint (3 days) / Standard (1 week) / Phased (3–4 weeks) | Sprint blocks White-glove + Multi-cohort + Full-stack integrations |
| **Support Channel** | Access during + post-launch | Email / Shared channel / Dedicated IM | Dedicated IM only with Standard or Phased pace |
| **Post-Launch Window** | How long we stay engaged | None / 15 days / 30 days / 60 days | 60-day window requires Dedicated IM |
| **Volume** *(domain-specific)* | Record count being migrated | <10K / 10K–100K / 100K+ | 100K+ blocks Self-serve and Async-reviewed migration |

**Invalid combinations the configurator must block:**
- Sprint pace + White-glove migration
- Sprint pace + Multi-cohort training
- Sprint pace + Full-stack integrations
- Self-serve migration + 100K+ records
- Full-stack integrations + Self-serve migration
- 60-day post-launch window without Dedicated IM
- Multi-cohort training + Sprint pace

---

## Part 3 — Three Tiers + Build-Your-Own

### Tier 1 — Launch Lite — **$900**
- **Configuration:** Async-reviewed migration · SSO-only · Admin live training · Standard pace (1 week) · Shared channel · 15-day window · <10K records
- **Positioning:** For self-sufficient enterprise buyers with clean data and a technical admin — we validate, you execute.
- **Pricing logic:** Anchored at ~36% of current flagship; entry point that justifies a paid onboarding (vs. free) by guaranteeing successful go-live.

### Tier 2 — Launch Core *(flagship — replaces current $2,500 package)* — **$2,500**
- **Configuration:** Done-for-you migration · SSO + 1 integration · Admin + 1 end-user cohort · Standard pace (1 week) · Shared channel · 30-day window · up to 100K records
- **Positioning:** For most enterprise customers — we handle the migration, train your team, and stay close through first 30 days.
- **Pricing logic:** Holds your current price point. Sum of equivalent BYO atoms = ~$3,200 — flagship preserves ~22% discount vs. à la carte.

### Tier 3 — Launch Premium — **$6,500**
- **Configuration:** White-glove migration · Full-stack integrations (3+) · Admin + multi-cohort training · Phased pace (3–4 weeks) · Dedicated IM · 60-day window · 100K+ records
- **Positioning:** For complex enterprise rollouts with messy source data, multiple business systems, and distributed teams.
- **Pricing logic:** Anchored against typical SI/consulting implementation fees ($10–25K) for comparable scope; positioned as vendor-led alternative at ~⅓ the cost. Sum of equivalent BYO atoms = ~$8,400.

### Build-Your-Own Framework

**Base:** $900 (Launch Lite configuration)

**Per-dimension upgrade pricing:**
| Upgrade | Add |
|---|---|
| Migration: Async → Done-for-you | +$700 |
| Migration: Done-for-you → White-glove | +$1,400 |
| Integration: +1 business system | +$500 each |
| Integration: Full stack (3+) | +$1,500 flat |
| Training: +1 end-user cohort | +$400 each |
